title: Tier-tagged collections plus System.FS and Path packages

source.subject: feat(corelib): tier-tag collections + System.{FS,Path} and add tier coverage suites

body:
Introduces tier-tagged collection types plus **System.FS** and **System.Path** packages with tier coverage suites in corelib.

## Platform specification

- **Corelib API shape** — `/platform-spec/core-library/stability-and-api-shape/corelib-api-shape` — *implements* (required)

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `corelib`
- **Commit:** [`d706067`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid_standard/commit/d706067)
- **Subject:** feat(corelib): tier-tag collections + System.{FS,Path} and add tier coverage suites
- **Completed:** 2026-05-23

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.3 (Macros, concurrency, and stabilization)
- **Workstream:** `stabilization`
- **Domain:** `core-library`
- **Deliverable:** `v03-corelib-tier-ship`

## Relation
Contributes to deliverable **Corelib tier collections ship** (`v03-corelib-tier-ship`). Normative spec: **Corelib API shape** (*implements*).
